ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to (e.g., Western Europe, Southeastern Asia) */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government (e.g., republic, monarchy) */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "happiness_data" (
  "happiness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each happiness data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "happiness_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country in terms of happiness */,
  "happiness_score" REAL /* Happiness score of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "survey_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the happiness data (e.g., survey, census) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., World Happiness Report, UN) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("happiness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_data_version FOREIGN KEY ("version") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_data_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "economic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate of the country */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the country */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the country */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., World Bank, IMF) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_version FOREIGN KEY ("version") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_data" (
  "social_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "family_support" REAL /* Level of family support in the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., World Values Survey, UN) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_data_version FOREIGN KEY ("version") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_data_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_data" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy in the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "healthcare_spending" REAL /* Healthcare spending per capita */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., WHO, UN) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_version FOREIGN KEY ("version") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "freedom_data" (
  "freedom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each freedom data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "freedom_score" REAL /* Level of freedom in the country */,
  "trust_in_government" REAL /* Level of trust in government in the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., Freedom House, UN) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("freedom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_freedom_data_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_freedom_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_freedom_data_version FOREIGN KEY ("version") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "generosity_data" (
  "generosity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generosity data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "generosity_score" REAL /* Level of generosity in the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., World Giving Index, UN) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generosity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generosity_data_version FOREIGN KEY ("version") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generosity_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generosity_data_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
